name: Industry Master
description_en: Distill an entire industry into a runnable "Master OS" skill—researching its leaders, tool map, workflows, canon, sources, and terminology across six tracks.
description_zh: 把一整个行业蒸馏成可运行的「行业 Master OS」skill——从大佬、工具地图、工作流、知识正典、信息源到术语,六轨深度调研。
long_en: Given an industry, it generates a self-contained {industry}.master skill installable by Claude Code, Codex, and other SKILL.md agents, putting the agent into "domain veteran" mode.
long_zh: 输入一个行业,生成自包含的 {industry}.master skill,可被 Claude Code、Codex 等支持 SKILL.md 的 agent 安装,让 AI 进入「资深从业者」模式。
sec_note_en: Runs web research and writes a new skill directory locally; review the generated skill before relying on it.
sec_note_zh: 会进行网络调研并在本地写出新的 skill 目录;依赖前请审阅生成的 skill。
